remember: Recall the plot, characters, and setting of the poem 'We're Not Afraid to Die'
Identify the poet, title, and publication date of the poem
List the stanzas and their corresponding themes
understand: Explain the poet's message and tone in the poem
Identify the poetic devices used in the poem and their effects
Describe the significance of the title 'We're Not Afraid to Die' in the context of the poem
apply: Apply the concept of imagery to analyze the poem's description of nature
Use the poem as an example to explain the theme of mortality
Explain how the poet's use of metaphor contributes to the overall meaning of the poem
analyze: Analyze the poet's use of symbolism in the poem and its significance
Compare and contrast the poet's views on death in 'We're Not Afraid to Die' with other literary works
Explain how the poem's structure and stanza layout contribute to its overall effect

ncert_objectives: To know the theme of the poem and its significance
To understand the poet's message and tone
To identify and explain the poetic devices used in the poem
board_exam_objectives: To recall the plot, characters, and setting of the poem
To explain the theme and significance of the poem
To analyze the poet's use of language and poetic devices
